prompt: Implement `loadConfig : ConfigPath -> Task Config` that reads the file and parses it. The parse step is pure; only the read is effectful. Do not invent I/O helpers — `File.read` is the only effect in scope.

scope.name: Task.andThen
scope.ty: Task a, (a -> Task b) -> Task b

scope.name: Result.match
scope.ty: Result a e, (a -> b), (e -> b) -> b
